summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. The preflight artifact hydrates 20 of 25 listed PR refs; all hydrated refs are open pull requests with no shared canonical, no security-sensitive signal, and no allowed merge/fix path. Five listed refs are absent from the compacted preflight artifact, so live state is unavailable for those specific decisions.
